name: Juno Glow
explanation: A warm 6-voice DCO polyphonic synthesizer. Each voice runs ONE rock-stable digitally-controlled oscillator (a band-limited saw blended with a variable-width pulse driven by PWM), a square sub-oscillator an octave down and a sip of noise, into a resonant low-pass shaped by its own envelope (Cutoff, Env Amount, Resonance) and a snappy amp contour. The whole bus then passes through the signature lush BBD-style stereo ENSEMBLE CHORUS that gives the shimmering width. Controls: Cutoff, Resonance, Env Amount, PWM, Sub, Chorus, Release and Level.
